chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-741 of 2026 [Muhammad Asif Raza v. Province of Sindh & others] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) Present: Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. Riazat Ali Sahar J. 1. For orders on M.A. No.3051/2026. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.3052/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 16.04.2026 Mr. Meer Ahmed Mangrio, Advocate for Petitioner. == Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J- Urgency granted. Exemption application is granted subject to all just exceptions. The prayer of the petitioner is to quash FIR No.59 of 2026 registered at PS Sakrand, under sections 380 and 457 PPC. The ground taken for invoking Constitutional Jurisdiction is that the offence is not made out even as per the contents of the FIR. On query of the Court, learned counsel concedes that investigation is still ongoing. That being so, we do not see any exceptional circumstance to interfere with police investigation. Suffice to state that once a challan is submitted before the concerned Court, the petitioner will have an alternate remedy for seeking pre-mature acquittal by application under section 249-A or 265-K Cr.P.C as the case may be. Therefore, the petition is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
